entries.summary: Prompt-spec expected post-edit pass-1 W = W_pre + 1 (label-shift) -> pass-2 W = W_pre. Observed: a stale CWD-side p12_journal_main.aux from session 128 caused MiKTeX's pdflatex to read it preferentially over build_115/p12_journal_main.aux, persisting the new \bibitem{ohyama2006} as 'undefined cite' across multiple passes. Resolution: deleted the stale CWD-side .aux/.log/.out and rebuilt build_115/ from scratch. Steady state after fresh pass-1 + pass-2: W = 24 = W_pre exactly, 0 errors, 0 undefined references. PDF: 22 pages (baseline 21 + 1 from new remark page-break, acceptable per A4 D.4).
entries.remediation: Logged for posterity. Future executors should ensure CWD-side aux files are cleaned before -output-directory builds, OR run pdflatex without -output-directory (in-place build).
entries.impact: None on substantive result; A4 acceptance criterion satisfied at steady state.
